creator: tilman@arved.de
text:
Since this PR is nearly a year old, Perhaps some action should be taken.
Some ports already require readline 4.2 and are broken because of that.

As kris stated:
"perhaps he can do the MFC (otherwise I can)" and ache stated he is
unable to do this, someone may try to assign this PR to kris ;)...

regards 
arved
